message:
Merge PR #2580: feat: add Witness dispatch message types

Phase 1 of idle polecat auto-dispatch (te-l0o). Adds DISPATCH_ATTEMPT, DISPATCH_OK, DISPATCH_FAIL, and IDLE_PASSIVATED protocol message types with parsers and tests. Purely additive — no existing behavior changed.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2580
Author: alessandrogerbini
